caption:
New on All The Wagons: individual model pages.

We built deep-dive pages for the wagons people actually go looking for — every generation of a nameplate on one page, with the real specs lined up side by side: hp, torque, 0-60, cargo, curb weight, MSRP.

First batch is live, grouped by brand: Subaru Outback · Forester · Legacy · Audi A4 · A6 · RS2 · RS4 · RS6 Avant · Volvo V70 · V70 R · XC70 · V60 · V90 · 850 · VW Passat · Cadillac CTS-V Wagon · Mercedes E63 AMG · Dodge Magnum · BMW M3 & M5 Touring.

It's our first build and we're still adding — if a spec's off or your favorite trim is missing, tell us. That's the whole point. Free, no login.

allthewagons.com  (link in bio)

#wagon #stationwagon #estatecar #longroof #avant #volvowagon #subaruoutback #rs6avant #touring #shootingbrake #wagonlife

Confession: we made a newsletter. For wagons. And if you've read this far, you already know it's for you.

Sign up and all three of our guides are yours free the second you join — the 25-year Import Cheat Sheet, the New Wagon Buyer's Guide, and the Performance Wagon Depreciation Report. After that, just the occasional email when there's genuinely something worth your time. No spam. No SUV propaganda.

https://allthewagons.com/#subscribe

#wagons #stationwagon #longroof #cars #estatecar

Every wagon you can still buy new in the US, ranked cheapest to priciest — from the $24,295 Subaru Forester to the $121,500 BMW M5 Touring. 18 longroofs, with horsepower, drivetrain and MPG on every one.

https://allthewagons.com/new-wagon-price-guide/

#wagons #newcars #cars #stationwagon #carbuying

An ~$86,000 Mercedes E63 AMG wagon now trades for about a third of that. A Cadillac CTS-V wagon has held ~72% of its value — and the manuals sell for MORE than they cost new. We charted how ten of the greatest performance wagons held their value, from 38% to 89% of MSRP.

https://allthewagons.com/high-performance-wagon-depreciation/

#wagons #cars #depreciation #E63AMG #CTSV #carenthusiast

The best wagons were never sold here — the Audi RS2, JDM Legacy and Stagea wagons, the fast Euro estates. Good news: under the U.S. 25-year rule, almost any of them can be legally imported. Here's exactly how it works, the forms you file, and the traps that catch first-time importers.

https://allthewagons.com/how-to-import-a-wagon/

#wagons #JDM #importcar #25yearrule #forbiddenfruit

Wagon, estate, shooting brake, crossover — what actually makes a wagon a wagon? We defined it with measurable specs instead of opinions: roofline, ride height, proportions, doors. If you've ever argued about this at a car meet, here's the settle-it answer.

https://allthewagons.com/what-is-a-wagon/

#wagons #stationwagon #cars #estatecar #longroof

Everyone bought the SUV. But on space, efficiency, handling and cost, how does it actually stack up against the wagon it replaced? We ran the numbers head-to-head — and the wagon wins more rounds than you'd expect.

https://allthewagons.com/wagon-vs-suv/

#wagons #SUV #cars #stationwagon #carcommunity
